title: Miami Heat Wave
lead: Miami is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.37. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Miami is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 10.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 70%, and wind speed is moderate at 11.7 km/h. 
 The Heat Wave has significant implications for the city's infrastructure and daily life, with a critical level of severity.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
agri_impact: Crops at risk due to heat
